sql.up: DO $$ BEGIN IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'configs') THEN DELETE FROM public.configs WHERE type = 'DATASET'; END IF; IF EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM information_schema.tables WHERE table_schema = 'public' AND table_name = 'config_history') THEN DELETE FROM public.config_history WHERE lower(config_type) = 'dataset'; END IF; END $$
